Пример слайда с содержанием презентации.
Перечисли здесь смысловые части своей презентации, 
чтобы рассказать слушателям о ходе выступления.
ИНСТРУКЦИИ
IDLM Inverse-distilled Diffusion Language Models
David Li*; 1, Nikita Gushchin*; 2,3, Dmitry Abulkhanov, Eric Moulines1,4, Ivan Oseledets2,3, 
Maxim Panov1, Alexander Korotin2,3
1 MBZUAI, Abu Dhabi, UAE
2 Applied AI Institute, Moscow, Russia
3 AXXX, Moscow, Russia
4 EPITA, Paris, France
6 BRAIn Lab, Moscow, Russia
* Equal contribution
Accepted to ICML 2026

Intuition
Unmasking occurs only once during generation, so the transition timestep does not matter. We only need to move to the 
correct token.

not hold. We will later demonstrate this difference in 
the case of Uniform Diffusion.

Uniform Diffusion
● with SG

DMD-like distillation is ineffective in practice for uniform diffusion. In contrast, using gradients from intermediate states yields a 
substantially more stable training procedure.

Intuition of IDLM loss: Uniform DiffusionFace 
mask to 
image
Reference
Connected with the holding time in the 
intermediate state
Intuition
● If a generator token has low teacher probability after noising at timestep , the teacher has a short 
holding time there, which discourages the generator from predicting it.
● If a generator token has high teacher probability but low fake probability, the generator is even more 
strongly discouraged from predicting it. (An attraction/repulsion analogy formulated in terms of 
holding times)

Overall Intuition of Distribution Matching ParadigmFace

Mixture of distributions!
Intuition
In theory, the generator should sample from the vocabulary space. Thus, during training, its output 
distribution is encouraged to approach a delta distribution over vocabulary tokens.

Practical implementationFace 
mask to 
image
Reference
What latent space do we use in practice?
1 Model initialization & parameterization
2 Challenges in one-step generation
A strong initialization, as the teacher already captures text semantics and only its input process requires acceleration.
Single-step text generator distillation remains challenging, likely because each latent must collapse to a delta 
distribution, causing instability.
Inspired by DMD2 13, we adopt multi-step distillation to address this issue, enabling the model to generate samples in a few-step regime
Solution
